name: Player Ready
description: Player selection confirmed and adventure beginning

prompts.label: player selection confirmed with 8-bit ready fanfare
prompts.text: player selection confirmed with 8-bit ready fanfare, NES coin-collect jingle, bitcrushed square wave blip, arcade cabinet excitement, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp, with natural decay

prompts.label: character chosen with ascending chiptune power-up melody
prompts.text: character chosen with ascending chiptune power-up melody, pixel game power-up, pulse wave arpeggio, joystick-era nostalgia, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, punchy, smooth fade out

prompts.label: retro game starting with pixel hero spawning jingle
prompts.text: retro game starting with pixel hero spawning jingle, Game Boy startup melody, triangle wave bass note, high-score elation, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, bright, sustained resonance

prompts.label: NES player one ready with dramatic square wave buildup
prompts.text: NES player one ready with dramatic square wave buildup, SID chip tracker groove, noise channel snare hit, speed-run intensity, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp, with natural decay

prompts.label: bitcrushed countdown completing with launch melody
prompts.text: bitcrushed countdown completing with launch melody, 16-bit victory screen, lo-fi sample playback crunch, bonus-stage energy, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, punchy, smooth fade out
